monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes Iran, Kuwait Intercepts Missiles; Tehran Threatens Energy Exports
— S4 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 7h ago. The Palestinian Health Ministry reports the death toll from Israel's military campaign in Gaza has risen to 73,246, with thousands more wounded.

US Forces Strike Tanker Heading to Kharg Island in Persian Gulf
— S3 · Conflict · Persian Gulf · 1m ago. US forces fired Hellfire missiles at the engine room of M/T Belma, a tanker attempting to reach Iran's Kharg Island, as part of the renewed naval blockade.
